briefdescription.para: This macro reads a value from a HDMI RX register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit read is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is read from the register. The most significant data will be read as 0.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDMI RX core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file).

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XV_HdmiRx1_ReadReg(UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes a value to a HDMI RX register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit write is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is written.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDMI RX core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file) to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write into the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XV_HdmiRx1_WriteReg(UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
SR/SSB period error 0 counter register offset.
SR/SSB period error 1 counter register offset.
SR/SSB period error 2 counter register offset.
SR/SSB period error 3 counter register offset.
FRL word aligner tap select changed register offset.
PIO In Event Rising Edge Register offset.
PIO In Event Falling Edge Register offset.
DSC original HFront and Hsync values.
DSC original HBack and HCActive values.
DSC original HActive and VActive values.
PIO Out Dynamic HDR Data Mover enable mask.
PIO In Scrambler lock all lanes mask.
PIO In Scrambler lock all lanes shift.
PIO In SCDC scrambler enable mask.
PIO In SCDC TMDS clock ratio mask.
PIO In DSC packets present in stream.
This bit is present in PIO_IN_EVT reg only.

detaileddescription.para: It is set by IP when the DSC packets are present in stream.

briefdescription.para: This bit is preset in PIO_IN_EVT reg only.

detaileddescription.para: This bit is set when DSC packet errors are present.

briefdescription.para: VTD Vertical Sync Width Register offset.
VTD Horizontal Sync Width Register offset.
VTD Vertical Front Porch Register offset.
VTD Vertical Back Porch Register offset.
VTD Horizontal Front Porch Register offset.
VTD Horizontal Back Porch Register offset.
VTD VFP change interrupt enable mask.
VTD Status Vfp value change mask.
DDC Read EDID segment pointer offset.
DDC Read EDID write pointer offset.
DDC Read EDID read pointer offset.
DDC Control write message clear mask.
DDC Control read message clear mask.
DDC Control SCDC Read Write Event mask.
DDC Status state of the SCL input mask.
DDC Status state of the SDA input mask.
DDC Status HDCP AKSV event mask.
DDC Status HDCP write message buffer new event mask.
DDC Status HDCP read message buffer end event mask.
DDC Status HDCP read message buffer not completed event mask.
DDC Status HDCP 1.4 protocol event flag.
DDC Status HDCP 2.2 protocol event flag.
DDC Status SCDC Read Write event flag.
DDC Status 0x10 SCDC reg bit 0 Status_Update set by sink event flag.
DDC Status HDCP 2.2 write message buffer words mask.
DDC Status HDCP 2.2 write message buffer words shift.
DDC Status HDCP 2.2 write message buffer empty mask.
DDC Status HDCP 2.2 read message buffer words mask.
DDC Status HDCP 2.2 read message buffer words shift.
DDC Status HDCP 2.2 read message buffer empty mask.
AUX Lower address Dynamic HDR Status offset.
AUX Higher address Dynamic HDR Status offset.
AUX Control FSync/VRR change event enable mask.
AUX Status General control packet mask.
AUX Status Dynamic HDR packet received event mask.
AUX Status GCP pixel phase mask.
AUX Status GCP pixel phase Shift.
AUX VTEM FVA Factor minus 1 mask.
AUX VTEM Base refresh rate mask.
AUX VTEM Next transfer rate mask.
AUX FSYNC Pro Native Color space active mask.
AUX FSYNC Pro Brightness Control Active mask.
AUX FSYNC Pro Seamless Local Dimming Disable Control mask.
AUX FSYNC FreeSync Minimum refresh rate mask.
AUX FSYNC FreeSync Maximum refresh rate mask.
Errors asserted while writing to memory.
AUD Control ACR Update Event Enable mask.
LNKSTA Link Error Counter Channel 0 Register offset.
LNKSTA Link Error Counter Channel 1 Register offset.
LNKSTA Link Error Counter Channel 2 Register offset.
Tri-byte Analyzer Line Size Register offset.
Tri-byte analyzer timing changed count mask.
Tri-byte analyzer timing changed count shift.
Tri-byte analyzer timing vsync polarity mask.
Tri-byte analyzer timing hsync polarity mask.
This header file contains identifiers and register-level core functions (or macros) that can be used to access the Xilinx HDMI RX core.

detaileddescription.para: For more information about the operation of this core see the hardware specification and documentation in the higher level driver xv_hdmirx1.h file.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 EB 02/05/19 Initial release.
